ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score entry */,
  "mpqa_pos_count" INTEGER /* Positive count from MPQA sentiment analysis */,
  "mpqa_neg_count" INTEGER /* Negative count from MPQA sentiment analysis */,
  "bingliu_pos_count" INTEGER /* Positive count from Bing Liu sentiment analysis */,
  "bingliu_neg_count" INTEGER /* Negative count from Bing Liu sentiment analysis */,
  "afinn_pos_score" REAL /* Positive score from AFINN analysis */,
  "afinn_neg_score" REAL /* Negative score from AFINN analysis */,
  "s140_pos_score" REAL /* Positive score from S140 analysis */,
  "s140_neg_score" REAL /* Negative score from S140 analysis */,
  "nrc_hash_sent_pos_score" REAL /* Positive score from NRC Hash Sentiment analysis */,
  "nrc_hash_sent_neg_score" REAL /* Negative score from NRC Hash Sentiment analysis */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text_id in the analyzed_texts table */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis method used */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the sentiment score was generated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sentiment analysis algorithm or model used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_scores_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES analyzed_texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emotions" (
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emotion score entry */,
  "nrc_anger" INTEGER /* Score for anger from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_anticipation" INTEGER /* Score for anticipation from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_disgust" INTEGER /* Score for disgust from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_fear" INTEGER /* Score for fear from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_joy" INTEGER /* Score for joy from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_sadness" INTEGER /* Score for sadness from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_surprise" INTEGER /* Score for surprise from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_trust" INTEGER /* Score for trust from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_negative" INTEGER /* Negative score from NRC analysis */,
  "nrc_positive" INTEGER /* Positive score from NRC analysis */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the text_id in the analyzed_texts table */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Sentiment analysis method used */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date when the emotion score was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emotions_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES analyzed_texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the source (e.g., social media, review site) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the source if applicable */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the text source (e.g., social media, review site, blog) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the text source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyzed_texts" (
  "text_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the source of the text */,
  "text_content" TEXT /* The actual text content that was analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "sentiment_score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment_score_id in the sentiment_scores table */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emotion_id in the emotions table */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the text analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("text_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyzed_texts_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES text_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_profiles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, marketing manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., marketing, sales) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the text */,
  "text_id" INTEGER /* ID of the text being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the text analysis was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report_id in the reports table */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access action (e.g., filters applied, visualizations viewed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_text_id FOREIGN KEY ("text_id") REFERENCES analyzed_texts ("text_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "sentiment_score_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sentiment_score_id in the sentiment_scores table */,
  "emotion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the emotion_id in the emotions table */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., sentiment analysis, emotion analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_emotion_id FOREIGN KEY ("emotion_id") REFERENCES emotions ("emotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_profiles ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_sentiment_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_score_id") REFERENCES sentiment_scores ("score_id")
)
